title: 宝塚記念の後に・再生、そして、脈動

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Suzuka's speed is terrifying! And Air Groove's
intensity is absolutely suffocating! Even Bright—)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no! This isn't about them! I have to focus
on myself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(The weak girl hiding in everyone's shadow is
gone! I'm leaving her behind in this race!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I'm going to win! I'll prove it! I'll prove who
Mejiro Dober really is!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (How strange... I can't hear the crowd at all.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (It's so quiet. But...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(My chest feels like it's about to burst. My heart is
pounding so fast and hard.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Oh... I get it. It's because—)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I want to win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Right now, I'm racing against my peers...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (My rival, who is also seeking her own legacy...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (And my role model, who has guided me so far...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And I want to beat all of them!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I have to win! I have to! I have to prove my
strength!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'll show everyone that I'm the best—the
strongest! I'm turning the page on my past and
starting a new chapter!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Another Mejiro legacy will be forged today!
Today I become... Mejiro Dober!
choice_data_list: You managed to come to terms with yourself.
You managed to come to terms with yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Yeah. I did.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I faced myself head-on and found my true self in
the process.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So... I've made up my mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer. I have another request.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I want to race in the Queen Elizabeth II Cup next.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I heard that Air Groove is also going to run in it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And I want to race against her there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
For the sake of Air Groove who gave me so much,
and for the ideal she led me to...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to challenge and defeat her... Only then
can I become Mejiro Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This decisive race will be held in the fall at the
honorable Queen Elizabeth II Cup, where peerless
queens all gather to compete.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To ensure Mejiro Dober will be more than ready
for the cup, we decide to set the Fuchu
Umamusume Stakes as a midpoint goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we set out on our path together.
